pages.raw_text:
"He said the administration and the
officers were anarchists, liars and
thieves" said officer Lister to Judge
Hinkle this afternoon. 81 didn't wait
for any more, but just went through
the crowd and took him off the box


For calling the mayor and his
henchmen anarchists, liars and
thieves" Miles o. Byrne, socialist
speaker, was fined IS and costs by
Judge Hinkle. The only testimony
showing disorderly conduct was that
Byrne spoke for two minutes after
being notified that the mayor had re-
voked his permit.


Byrne said he didn't refer to In
dividuals, but to class. He said. fur
ther, he knew nothing about the may
or and corruption but what he read
in the newspapers. The excuse didn't
have weight with the court and the
fine was imposed for reading the
PAPERS.
